briefPolicy.guidance: Use as much detail as needed to make the work executable and verifiable. Do not shorten a brief just to satisfy a default word count.

returnPolicy.limit: no hard word limit; keep the opening summary concise and include all evidence needed to verify the result

runtimePolicy.guidance: Use /nogra:settings to view or change runtime profile, role models, role effort and advisory budget. Manager describes the active Claude Code conversation and is advisory unless the user also switches /model and /effort. Agent and verifier describe desired disposable run-agent routing when the client/runtime can honor model and effort. Interactive plugin mode treats budget as advisory; hard maxUsdPerRun applies only to headless runtimes that support budget flags.

routingPolicy.guidance: Adjust sensitivityPercent from 0 to 100. Values snap to sensitivityStepPercent; default step is 5. Higher sensitivity lowers effective offer thresholds and makes Claude offer Nogra more often; lower sensitivity raises thresholds and keeps Claude more direct. defaultLanguage and dictionary let the workspace add non-English routing phrases while keeping the core English-first. translationFallback=claude-current-prompt means Claude may use its current-prompt understanding; it is not an external translation call. autoOfferThreshold and strongOfferThreshold are retained as legacy/advanced values. This controls local guidance only and never authorizes MCP calls, dispatch, verification, subagents or extension execution.
